overall.description: A MetaHuman character explores a vast, cracked white desert or salt flat landscape under a clear blue sky. The character walks away from the camera across the open terrain, then turns and walks back toward the viewer, demonstrating high-fidelity game engine rendering with realistic lighting and shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: vast white salt flat with distant rolling dunes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily away from camera across the flat white terrain toward the distant horizon

entered.detail: rolling white hills forming the horizon line against the blue sky
flat white cracked earth or salt flat surface extending in all directions

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a vast, empty white landscape under a clear blue sky. The MetaHuman character walks away from the camera across the cracked white ground toward distant rolling dunes, with long shadows cast across the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: vast white salt flat with distant rolling dunes

events.description: character completes a 180-degree turn and begins walking back toward the camera

agents.ego_description: walking directly toward the camera after turning around, maintaining steady pace across the white terrain

segments.scene_description: The character turns around and begins walking back toward the camera across the same white cracked terrain. The distant dunes remain visible in the background as the character approaches, with the camera maintaining consistent distance while tracking the approach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a vast, cracked white desert as a lone figure traverses the open terrain. It begins with the MetaHuman character walking away from the camera, moving across the stark white ground toward distant rolling dunes under a clear blue sky. As the character reaches a certain point, they turn around and begin walking back toward the viewer, with long shadows stretching across the textured surface. The scene then maintains a consistent tracking distance as the character approaches, keeping the distant dunes visible in the background. Finally, the camera captures the character's steady return across the expansive salt flats, emphasizing the high-fidelity lighting of the desolate landscape.
